_comment: Supabase SSR rules. Loaded when frameworks.*.backend is 'supabase'.

rules.message: Use PUBLISHABLE_KEY, not ANON_KEY. Supabase SSR 0.10+ renamed this.
@supabase/auth-helpers-nextjs is deprecated. Use @supabase/ssr with createClient from @/lib/supabase/server or client.
Deprecated Supabase auth helper. Use createClient() from @/lib/supabase/server (server) or @/lib/supabase/client (client).
Never trust getSession() in server code — session data can be spoofed. Use auth.getClaims() (validates JWT signature) or auth.getUser() (hits Auth server) instead.
Never expose service_role key in client code — it bypasses RLS. Use PUBLISHABLE_KEY for client, service_role only in server actions or edge functions.
